ogTitle: Labertouche vs Ladys Pass: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Labertouche and Ladys Pass.
heading: Labertouche vs Ladys Pass — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Labertouche, Victoria and Ladys Pass, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ladys Pass has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Labertouche (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Labertouche or Ladys Pass safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Labertouche has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Ladys Pass scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Labertouche scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Ladys Pass scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Labertouche or Ladys Pass?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ladys Pass has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
